verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Beati omnes qui timent Dominum,  qui ambulant in viis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲל֥וֹת אַ֭שְׁרֵי כׇּל־יְרֵ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה הַ֝הֹלֵ֗ךְ בִּדְרָכָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Blessed is every one that feareth the Lord; that walketh in his ways.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labores manuum tuarum quia manducabis :  beatus es, et bene tibi erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְגִ֣יעַ כַּ֭פֶּיךָ כִּ֣י תֹאכֵ֑ל אַ֝שְׁרֶ֗יךָ וְט֣וֹב לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: For thou shalt eat the labour of thine hands: happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Uxor tua sicut vitis abundans  in lateribus domus tuæ ;  filii tui sicut novellæ olivarum  in circuitu mensæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׁתְּךָ֤ ׀ כְּגֶ֥פֶן פֹּרִיָּה֮ בְּיַרְכְּתֵ֢י בֵ֫יתֶ֥ךָ בָּ֭נֶיךָ כִּשְׁתִלֵ֣י זֵיתִ֑ים סָ֝בִ֗יב לְשֻׁלְחָנֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine house: thy children like olive plants round about thy table.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce sic benedicetur homo  qui timet Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה כִי־כֵ֭ן יְבֹ֥רַךְ גָּ֗בֶר יְרֵ֣א יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicat tibi Dominus ex Sion,  et videas bona Jerusalem omnibus diebus vitæ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְבָרֶכְךָ֥ יְהֹוָ֗ה מִצִּ֫יּ֥וֹן וּ֭רְאֵה בְּט֣וּב יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם כֹּ֝֗ל יְמֵ֣י חַיֶּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et videas filios filiorum tuorum :  pacem super Israël.
verses.king_james: Yea, thou shalt see thy children’s children, and peace upon Israel.
